passage_title: How much higher? How much faster?

sentences.sentence: Since the early years of the twentieth century, when the International Athletic Federation began keeping records, there has been a steady improvement in how fast athletes run, how high they jump and how far they are able to hurl massive objects, themselves included, through space.
sentences.translation: 自20世纪初国际田径联合会开始记录成绩以来，运动员奔跑、跳跃和将包括自己在内的巨大物体掷向空中的能力一直稳步提高。

structure.text: Since the early years of the twentieth century
when the International Athletic Federation began keeping records
there has been a steady improvement
in how fast athletes run, how high they jump and how far they are able to hurl massive objects, themselves included, through space

difficult_points: there has been 是存在句，since 从句说明起始时间。
三个 how 从句并列说明能力提升的不同维度。

sentences.sentence: For the so-called power events—that require a relatively brief, explosive release of energy, like the 100-metre sprint and the long jump—times and distances have improved ten to twenty percent.
sentences.translation: 对于所谓力量型项目——需要短暂而爆发性释放能量，如百米赛跑和跳远——成绩和距离提高了10%至20%。

structure.text: For the so-called power events
that require a relatively brief, explosive release of energy
times and distances have improved ten to twenty percent

difficult_points: 破折号中的定语从句修饰 power events。
ten to twenty percent 表示提升幅度。

sentences.sentence: In the endurance events the results have been more dramatic.
sentences.translation: 在耐力项目中，成绩提升更加显著。

structure.text: In the endurance events
the results have been more dramatic

difficult_points: more dramatic 比较前文 power events 的提升。
have been 是现在完成时，概括长期变化。

sentences.sentence: At the 1908 Olympics, John Hayes of the U.S.
sentences.translation: 在1908年奥运会上，美国的约翰·海斯……

structure.text: At the 1908 Olympics
John Hayes of the U.S.

difficult_points: 源文在 U.S. 处截断，下一句接 team ran；按原文保留。
of the U.S. 是人物所属国家说明。

sentences.sentence: team ran the marathon in a time of 2:55:18.
sentences.translation: 代表美国队以2小时55分18秒跑完马拉松。

structure.text: team ran the marathon
in a time of 2:55:18

difficult_points: team 承接上一句的 John Hayes of the U.S. team。
in a time of 表示用时。

sentences.sentence: In 1999, Morocco's Khalid Khannouchi set a new world record of 2:05:42, almost thirty percent faster.
sentences.translation: 1999年，摩洛哥的哈立德·卡努奇以2小时05分42秒创造了新的世界纪录，快了近30%。

structure.text: Morocco's Khalid Khannouchi
set a new world record of 2:05:42
almost thirty percent faster

difficult_points: faster 是相对1908年成绩的省略比较。
set a record 表示创造纪录。

sentences.sentence: No one theory can explain improvements in performance, but the most important factor has been genetics.
sentences.translation: 没有一种理论能解释成绩提升，但最重要的因素一直是遗传。

structure.text: No one theory can explain improvements in performance
but the most important factor has been genetics

difficult_points: but 连接否定概括与核心因素。
has been genetics 强调遗传因素持续重要。

sentences.sentence: "The athlete must choose his parents carefully," says Jesus Dapena, a sports scientist at Indiana University, invoking an oft-cited adage.
sentences.translation: “运动员必须谨慎选择父母，”印第安纳大学运动科学家耶稣·达佩纳说，并引用了一句常被引用的格言。

structure.text: The athlete must choose his parents carefully
says Jesus Dapena
a sports scientist at Indiana University
invoking an oft-cited adage

difficult_points: choose one's parents 是幽默地指遗传背景。
invoking 分词短语说明说话时的引用动作。

sentences.sentence: Over the past century, the composition of the human gene pool has not changed appreciably, but with increasing global participation in athletics—and greater rewards to tempt athletes—it is more likely that individuals possessing the unique complement of genes for athletic performance can be identified early.
sentences.translation: 过去一个世纪，人类基因库的构成没有明显改变；但随着全球参与田径运动的人增多、奖励更丰厚，拥有独特运动基因组合的人更可能被及早识别。

structure.text: Over the past century, the composition of the human gene pool has not changed appreciably
but with increasing global participation in athletics—and greater rewards to tempt athletes—it is more likely
that individuals possessing the unique complement of genes for athletic performance can be identified early
possessing the unique complement of genes for athletic performance

difficult_points: with 短语和破折号补充识别运动员的社会条件。
it is more likely that 是形式主语结构，possessing 修饰 individuals。

sentences.sentence: "Was there someone like [sprinter] Michael Johnson in the 1920s?" Dapena asks.
sentences.translation: “20世纪20年代是否有像短跑运动员迈克尔·约翰逊这样的人？”达佩纳问。

structure.text: Was there someone like [sprinter] Michael Johnson in the 1920s?
Dapena asks

difficult_points: Was there 是过去时存在句。
方括号 sprinter 是编辑性身份说明，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: "I'm sure there was, but his talent was probably never realized."
sentences.translation: “我确信有，但他的天赋可能从未被发现。”

structure.text: I'm sure there was
but his talent was probably never realized

difficult_points: there was 承接上一问，指过去确有类似天才。
was never realized 是被动语态，指天赋未被发掘。

sentences.sentence: Identifying genetically talented individuals is only the first step.
sentences.translation: 识别具有遗传天赋的人只是第一步。

structure.text: Identifying genetically talented individuals
is only the first step

difficult_points: Identifying 动名词短语作主语。
only 强调识别并非全部工作。

sentences.sentence: Michael Yessis, an emeritus professor of Sports Science at California State University at Fullerton, maintains that "genetics only determines about one third of what an athlete can do.
sentences.translation: 加州州立大学富勒顿分校体育科学荣休教授迈克尔·耶西斯认为：“遗传只能决定运动员能力的大约三分之一。

structure.text: Michael Yessis, an emeritus professor of Sports Science at California State University at Fullerton
maintains
that "genetics only determines about one third of what an athlete can do
what an athlete can do

difficult_points: maintains 后接 that 宾语从句。
what an athlete can do 是 one third 的内容从句。

sentences.sentence: But with the right training we can go much further with that one third than we've been going." Yessis believes that U.S.
sentences.translation: 但通过正确训练，我们可以把这三分之一的潜力发挥得远超以往。”耶西斯认为，美国……

structure.text: with the right training
we can go much further with that one third than we've been going
Yessis believes
that U.S.

difficult_points: with 短语说明发挥遗传潜力的条件。
源文在 U.S. 处截断，下一句接 runners，按原文保留。

sentences.sentence: runners, despite their impressive achievements, are "running on their genetics".
sentences.translation: 美国跑步运动员尽管成绩出色，却仍“只依靠遗传天赋”。

structure.text: runners, despite their impressive achievements
are "running on their genetics"

difficult_points: runners 承接上一句 U.S.。
run on their genetics 是比喻，指训练尚未充分开发遗传潜力。

sentences.sentence: By applying more scientific methods, "they're going to go much faster".
sentences.translation: 通过运用更科学的方法，“他们将会快得多”。

structure.text: By applying more scientific methods
they're going to go much faster

difficult_points: By applying 表示提高成绩的方式。
be going to 表示预测的未来结果。

sentences.sentence: These methods include strength training that duplicates what they are doing in their running events as well as plyometrics, a technique pioneered in the former Soviet Union.
sentences.translation: 这些方法包括模拟跑步项目动作的力量训练，以及前苏联首创的增强式训练。

structure.text: These methods include strength training that duplicates what they are doing in their running events as well as plyometrics, a technique pioneered in the former Soviet Union
that duplicates what they are doing in their running events
a technique pioneered in the former Soviet Union

difficult_points: that 修饰 strength training，what 从句作 duplicates 的宾语。
as well as 连接两种训练方法。

sentences.sentence: Whereas most exercises are designed to build up strength or endurance, plyometrics focuses on increasing power—the rate at which an athlete can expend energy.
sentences.translation: 大多数练习旨在增强力量或耐力，而增强式训练专注于提高爆发力——即运动员消耗能量的速度。

structure.text: Whereas most exercises are designed to build up strength or endurance
plyometrics focuses on increasing power
the rate at which an athlete can expend energy

difficult_points: Whereas 引导对比从句。
at which 引导定语从句修饰 rate。

sentences.sentence: When a sprinter runs, Yessis explains, her foot stays in contact with the ground for just under a tenth of a second, half of which is devoted to landing and the other half to pushing off.
sentences.translation: 耶西斯解释，短跑运动员奔跑时，脚与地面接触的时间不到十分之一秒，其中一半用于落地，另一半用于蹬离地面。

structure.text: When a sprinter runs
her foot stays in contact with the ground for just under a tenth of a second
half of which is devoted to landing and the other half to pushing off

difficult_points: which 指代接触时间；half of which 分成两个用途。
be devoted to 后接动名词 landing 和 pushing off。

sentences.sentence: Plyometric exercises help athletes make the best use of this brief interval.
sentences.translation: 增强式练习帮助运动员充分利用这段短暂时间。

structure.text: Plyometric exercises
help athletes make the best use of this brief interval

difficult_points: help + 宾语 + 动词原形 make。
this brief interval 指脚与地面接触的短暂时间。

sentences.sentence: Nutrition is another area that sports trainers have failed to address adequately.
sentences.translation: 营养是体育教练未能充分解决的另一个领域。

structure.text: Nutrition
is another area
that sports trainers have failed to address adequately

difficult_points: that 修饰 area，address 在这里表示处理问题。
have failed to 表示到目前为止未能做到。

sentences.sentence: "Many athletes are not getting the best nutrition, even though supplements," Yessis insists.
sentences.translation: “许多运动员没有获得最佳营养，即使服用了补充剂，”耶西斯坚持说。

structure.text: Many athletes are not getting the best nutrition
even though supplements
Yessis insists

difficult_points: even though 后省略了 they take，源文为不完整结构。
getting the best nutrition 指摄入最适合的营养。

sentences.sentence: Each activity has its own nutritional needs.
sentences.translation: 每项活动都有自己的营养需求。

structure.text: Each activity
has
its own nutritional needs

difficult_points: Each 后接单数名词 activity，谓语用 has。
its 指各项活动。

sentences.sentence: Few coaches, for instance, understand how deficiencies in trace minerals can lead to injuries.
sentences.translation: 例如，很少有教练了解微量矿物质缺乏如何导致伤病。

structure.text: Few coaches
understand
how deficiencies in trace minerals can lead to injuries

difficult_points: how 从句作 understand 的宾语。
deficiencies in trace minerals 是微量矿物质缺乏。

sentences.sentence: Focused training will also play a role in enabling records to be broken.
sentences.translation: 有针对性的训练也将在打破纪录方面发挥作用。

structure.text: Focused training
will also play a role
in enabling records to be broken

difficult_points: play a role in 后接动名词 enabling。
records to be broken 是不定式被动结构。

sentences.sentence: "If we applied the Russian training model to some of the outstanding runners we have in this country," Yessis asserts, "they would be breaking records left and right."
sentences.translation: “如果我们把俄罗斯训练模式应用于我国一些杰出跑步运动员，”耶西斯断言，“他们会不断打破纪录。”

structure.text: If we applied the Russian training model to some of the outstanding runners we have in this country
they would be breaking records left and right
we have in this country

difficult_points: If + 过去式 applied 与 would 构成假设。
left and right 是习语，表示接连不断。

sentences.sentence: He will not predict by how much, however: "Exactly what the limits are it's hard to say, but there will be increases even if only by hundredths of a second, as long as our training continues to improve."
sentences.translation: 不过，他不愿预测具体能提高多少：“极限究竟在哪里很难说，但只要训练继续改进，即使只提高百分之一秒，也会有进步。”

structure.text: He will not predict by how much
Exactly what the limits are it's hard to say
but there will be increases even if only by hundredths of a second
as long as our training continues to improve

difficult_points: what the limits are 是主语从句，it 为形式主语。
as long as 引导条件从句；even if 让步强调微小进步。

sentences.sentence: One of the most important new methodologies is biomechanics, the study of the body in motion.
sentences.translation: 最重要的新方法之一是生物力学，即研究运动中身体的学科。

structure.text: One of the most important new methodologies
is biomechanics
the study of the body in motion

difficult_points: One of... 作主语时谓语用 is。
同位语解释 biomechanics 的含义。

sentences.sentence: A biomechanic films an athlete in action and then digitizes her performance, recording the motion of every joint and limb in three dimensions.
sentences.translation: 生物力学专家拍摄运动员的动作，再将其表现数字化，记录每个关节和肢体的三维运动。

structure.text: A biomechanic films an athlete in action and then digitizes her performance
recording the motion of every joint and limb in three dimensions

difficult_points: films 与 digitizes 并列，recording 分词短语表示伴随结果。
in three dimensions 表示三维记录。

sentences.sentence: By applying Newton's laws to these motions, "we can say that this athlete's run is not fast enough; that this one is not using his arms strongly enough during take-off," says Dapena, who uses these methods to help high jumpers.
sentences.translation: 通过把牛顿定律应用于这些动作，“我们可以判断某位运动员跑得不够快，另一位在起跳时手臂用力不够，”达佩纳说，他用这些方法帮助跳高运动员。

structure.text: By applying Newton's laws to these motions
we can say that this athlete's run is not fast enough; that this one is not using his arms strongly enough during take-off
who uses these methods to help high jumpers

difficult_points: By applying 说明生物力学分析方式。
两个 that 从句用分号并列，who 修饰 Dapena。

sentences.sentence: To date, however, biomechanics has made only a small difference to athletic performance.
sentences.translation: 然而，迄今为止，生物力学对运动成绩的影响仍然很小。

structure.text: To date
biomechanics has made only a small difference to athletic performance

difficult_points: To date 表示迄今为止。
make a difference to 表示产生影响。

sentences.sentence: Revolutionary ideas still come from the athletes themselves.
sentences.translation: 革命性的想法仍然来自运动员自己。

structure.text: Revolutionary ideas
still come from the athletes themselves

difficult_points: themselves 强调运动员本人，而非专家。
come from 表示想法来源。

sentences.sentence: For example, during the 1968 Olympics in Mexico City, a relatively unknown high jumper named Dick Fosbury won the gold by going over the bar backwards, in complete contradiction of all the received high-jumping wisdom, a move instantly dubbed the Fosbury flop.
sentences.translation: 例如，1968年墨西哥城奥运会上，相对默默无闻的跳高运动员迪克·福斯贝里背对横杆跃过，以完全违背传统跳高智慧的方式赢得金牌，这一动作立即被称为“福斯贝里背越式”。

structure.text: during the 1968 Olympics in Mexico City
a relatively unknown high jumper named Dick Fosbury won the gold
by going over the bar backwards
a move instantly dubbed the Fosbury flop

difficult_points: named Dick Fosbury 修饰 high jumper；by going 表示获胜方式。
dubbed 是过去分词，说明动作获得的名称。

sentences.sentence: Fosbury himself did not know what he was doing.
sentences.translation: 福斯贝里本人并不知道自己在做什么。

structure.text: Fosbury himself
did not know
what he was doing

difficult_points: himself 强调本人。
what 从句作 know 的宾语。

sentences.sentence: That understanding took the later analysis of biomechanics specialists who put their minds to comprehending something that was too complex and unorthodox ever to have been invented through their own mathematical simulations.
sentences.translation: 这种理解来自后来生物力学专家的分析；他们努力理解某种复杂而非正统、绝不可能仅靠数学模拟发明出来的东西。

structure.text: That understanding took the later analysis of biomechanics specialists
who put their minds to comprehending something
that was too complex and unorthodox ever to have been invented through their own mathematical simulations

difficult_points: put one's mind to 后接动名词 comprehending。
too...to... 表示复杂到不可能通过模拟自行发明；两个 who/that 从句层层修饰。

sentences.sentence: Fosbury also required another element that lies behind many improvements in athletic performance: an innovation in athletic equipment.
sentences.translation: 福斯贝里还需要另一个推动许多运动成绩提升的要素：运动器材创新。

structure.text: Fosbury also required another element
that lies behind many improvements in athletic performance
an innovation in athletic equipment

difficult_points: that 修饰 element，说明这一要素的作用。
冒号后同位解释 another element。

sentences.sentence: In Fosbury's case, it was the cushions that jumpers land on.
sentences.translation: 在福斯贝里的例子中，这个要素就是跳高运动员落地用的垫子。

structure.text: In Fosbury's case
it was the cushions that jumpers land on
that jumpers land on

difficult_points: it was...that... 强调 cushions。
关系代词作介词 on 的宾语，jumpers land on cushions。

sentences.sentence: Traditionally, high jumpers would land in pits filled with sawdust.
sentences.translation: 传统上，跳高运动员会落在填满锯末的坑里。

structure.text: Traditionally
high jumpers would land in pits
filled with sawdust

difficult_points: would 表示过去习惯。
filled with sawdust 修饰 pits。

sentences.sentence: But by Fosbury's time, sawdust pits had been replaced by soft foam cushions, ideal for flopping.
sentences.translation: 但到福斯贝里时代，锯末坑已被柔软泡沫垫取代，非常适合背越式落地。

structure.text: by Fosbury's time
sawdust pits had been replaced by soft foam cushions
ideal for flopping

difficult_points: had been replaced 是过去完成时被动语态。
ideal for flopping 是 cushions 的补充说明。

sentences.sentence: In the end, most people who examine human performance are humbled by the resourcefulness of athletes and the powers of the human body.
sentences.translation: 最终，大多数研究人类表现的人都会被运动员的机智和人体的力量所折服。

structure.text: In the end
most people who examine human performance
are humbled by the resourcefulness of athletes and the powers of the human body
who examine human performance

difficult_points: who 修饰 people；are humbled by 是被动表达。
resourcefulness 指灵活创造力，不仅是资源。

sentences.sentence: "Once you study athletics, you learn that it's a vexingly complex issue," says John S.
sentences.translation: “一旦研究田径，你就会发现这是一个令人困惑的复杂问题，”约翰·S.说。

structure.text: Once you study athletics
you learn that it's a vexingly complex issue
says John S.

difficult_points: Once 引导条件时间从句。
that 从句作 learn 的宾语；源文在 John S. 处截断。

sentences.sentence: Raglin, a sports psychologist at Indiana University.
sentences.translation: 拉格林，印第安纳大学的运动心理学家。

structure.text: Raglin
a sports psychologist at Indiana University

difficult_points: 源文是承接上一句引述的姓名和身份片段。
apposition 说明 Raglin 的职业。

sentences.sentence: "Core performance is not a simple or mundane thing of higher, faster, longer.
sentences.translation: “核心表现并不是简单或平庸的‘更高、更快、更远’。

structure.text: Core performance
is not a simple or mundane thing of higher, faster, longer

difficult_points: higher, faster, longer 是对运动目标的并列概括。
thing of 后接抽象特征，语义强调成绩并非单一指标。

sentences.sentence: So many variables enter into the equation, and our understanding in many cases is fundamental.
sentences.translation: 有如此多变量参与其中，而我们在许多情况下的理解还很基础。

structure.text: So many variables enter into the equation
and our understanding in many cases is fundamental

difficult_points: enter into the equation 是比喻，指纳入整体考量。
fundamental 在这里指基础、尚不深入。

sentences.sentence: We've got a long way to go." For the foreseeable future, records will be made to be broken.
sentences.translation: “我们还有很长的路要走。”在可预见的未来，纪录还会不断被打破。

structure.text: We've got a long way to go
For the foreseeable future
records will be made to be broken

difficult_points: a long way to go 表示仍有很大进步空间。
will be made to be broken 是被动结构，表达纪录注定会被刷新。
